d:
Florabelle summons Spiny when a battle starts. Spiny inherits [[80%]] of Florabelle's Max HP, dealing [[60%]]<ATK> damage with normal attacks. Spiny retreats to the pod when defeated, then rejoins the battle after [[10]]s.
Active. Florabelle selects a tile to summon Smashy to smash the ground, dealing [[300%]]<ATK> damage to all adjacent enemies and knocking them into the air. Smashy inherits [[220%]] of Florabelle's Max HP, dealing [[120%]]<ATK> damage with normal attacks. Smashy takes [[100%]] extra damage when under control effects.
Florabelle casts the skill to remove all debuffs on Smashy and restore its HP to full, commanding Smashy to smash the target area ground again.
Increases Spiny's normal attack damage to [[70%]]<ATK>.

When all three Bulbsprites are on the battlefield, summoning Smashy will instead trigger a coordinated attack from all Bulbsprites, dealing [[400%]]<ATK> damage to all enemies within 3 tiles and knocking them into the air.
Increases Spiny's normal attack damage to [[80%]]<ATK>.
Increases Smashy's normal attack damage to [[220%]]<ATK>.

Florabelle feeds a Bulbsprite with petalplum to transform them into a giant for [[8]]s. Giant Bulbsprites will gain an extra [[60]] Haste and [[60]] Life Drain. When multiple Bulbsprites are on the field, this skill targets them in the order of Smashy, Swifty, and Spiny.
Increases Life Drain in giant form to [[80]].
Increases Life Drain in giant form to [[100]].
Increases the duration of the giant form to [[10]]s.

Florabelle summons Swifty in the back. Swifty has a [[6]]-tile attack range, inherits [[45%]] of Florabelle's Max HP, and deals [[80%]]<ATK> damage with normal attacks. Casting this skill while Swifty is already on the battlefield initiates Swifty's Rapid Fire, unleashing [[8]] arrows at random targets, each dealing [[70%]]<ATK> damage. Swifty cannot be summoned again for the next [[8]]s after being defeated.
Increases Swifty's normal attack damage to [[95%]]<ATK>.
Increases the damage of each arrow to [[88%]]<ATK> when Swifty casts Rapid Fire.
Increases Swifty's normal attack damage to [[110%]]<ATK>.
Florabelle increases her ATK by [[10%]] during battle. She gains an extra [[4%]] ATK when at least 2 of her summons are on the battlefield.
Florabelle increases her ATK by [[14%]] during battle. She gains an extra [[6%]] ATK when at least 2 of her summons are on the battlefield.
Florabelle increases her ATK by [[18%]] during battle. She gains an extra [[8%]] ATK when at least 2 of her summons are on the battlefield.
Grants a Natural Blessing to allied summons upon their entrance to the battlefield, providing them with a permanent shield capable of absorbing damage equal to [[280%]] of Florabelle's ATK.
Boosts the shield granted by this skill to [[330%]] of Florabell's ATK.

Feeds the allied summon with the highest ATK with an unripe petalplum when Florabelle casts Overgrowth. This transforms the summon into a giant, increasing their Haste by [[27]] and Life Drain by [[32]].
Boosts the shield granted by this skill to [[350%]] of Florabell's ATK.

r.d: In Rivalry Mode, reduces damage taken by [[10%]] for [[20]]s when a battle starts. [[20]]s later, increases damage dealt by [[10%]] for [[20]]s.
Lvl. 4 Refinement: In Rivalry Mode, increases 10 Haste, 25 Crit DMG DEF.

d: Allied Bulbsprite in their giant form are immune to control effects.
Overgrowth has its cooldown reduced to [[5]]s and can simultaneously affect Smashy, Swifty, and Spiny. Meanwhile, allied summons in their giant form gain extra ATK equal to [[40%]]<ATK>.
